query: SELECT id, code, title, description FROM courses WHERE title LIKE '%TEST%' OR title LIKE '%Test%' OR code LIKE '%TEST%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, code, title, description FROM courses WHERE title LIKE '%TEST%' OR title LIKE '%Test%' OR code LIKE '%TEST%' LIMIT 20;

rows.title: Old Testament Survey
rows.description: Comprehensive overview of the Old Testament, covering the historical, wisdom, and prophetic books. Students will explore the major themes, key figures, and theological significance of the Hebrew scriptures, understanding how Old Testament narratives and prophecies connect to New Testament fulfillment and Christian theology.

rows.title: New Testament Survey
rows.description: Comprehensive study of the New Testament Gospels, Acts, epistles, and Revelation. Students will examine the life and teachings of Jesus, the early church, apostolic writings, and eschatological themes, developing a thorough understanding of New Testament theology and its practical applications for Christian living and ministry.
